complaint_text: Street lights have been out near the school for five nights and children are walking home in the dark.
Garbage collection has been skipped twice this week and stray dogs are tearing open trash bags.
The water pipeline in our apartment block has been leaking continuously and pressure is now very low.
My electricity bill shows a sudden extra charge and the support desk has not explained the increase.
Potholes on the main market road caused two bike accidents this morning and traffic is blocked.
The local clinic lost my mother's test report and delayed treatment for three days.
Our sewer line overflowed into the street and the smell is unbearable for nearby homes.
The bus route that connects our area to the station was cancelled without notice again.
Noise from late-night construction has continued past midnight for the last week.
The hospital billing desk charged us twice and no one has processed the refund request.
Street vendors are blocking the emergency exit near the metro stairway during rush hour.
Water supply stops every afternoon and families cannot store enough for cooking and washing.
The online property tax portal crashes before payment confirmation and penalties are increasing.
My complaint about broken traffic signals has been open for twelve days with no action.
The public toilet near the bus stand has not been cleaned for days and is unusable.
A transformer sparked loudly last night and power has been unstable since then.
The school scholarship office keeps rejecting forms without telling students what is missing.
A tree branch fell across the road after the storm and no cleanup crew has arrived.
Patients waited six hours because the registration system at the hospital went offline.
Drinking water smells contaminated and several residents reported stomach issues.
The city grievance website does not send complaint acknowledgements after submission.
Street dogs have become aggressive near the park and elderly residents are afraid to walk there.
The college hostel has repeated Wi-Fi outages during exams and students cannot access materials.
Road repair work was started and abandoned, leaving deep trenches uncovered.
Garbage bins near the market are overflowing every evening and attracting insects.
Our electricity meter reading was recorded incorrectly and the revised bill is still wrong.
The emergency ward had no wheelchair available for an elderly patient after admission.
The bus stop shelter roof is broken and commuters are exposed to rain and falling debris.
Textbook distribution for the new term is delayed and many students have no materials.
There is a major waterlogging problem at the junction after every small rainfall.
Two street lights on the narrow lane behind the clinic have not worked for ten days.
My pension verification request on the citizen portal has been pending for over a month.
Open manholes were left without warning signs near a busy residential crossing.
Frequent voltage drops are damaging appliances in our building and nobody is inspecting the line.
The health center appointment system booked the same slot for multiple patients.
The sanitation team missed biomedical waste pickup from the clinic for two days.
Water tankers promised during the outage never arrived in our neighborhood.
The after-school bus driver skipped our stop twice and students were stranded.
The university exam helpline never answers and students are missing correction deadlines.
Street harassment incidents near the underpass have increased and police patrols are absent.
The app for paying utility bills logs users out and loses transaction history.
The road divider near the hospital entrance is broken and vehicles are entering the wrong side.
Water supply contains visible sediment and residents are buying bottled water daily.
Several classrooms have broken fans and students cannot sit through afternoon lectures.
Power cuts have become frequent in the industrial block and small businesses are losing orders.
Garbage collection workers ignored our lane despite repeated complaints this month.
The ambulance access lane is blocked by illegal parking every evening.
The city bus tracking app shows wrong arrival times and people are missing connections.
A patient referral letter was uploaded to the wrong record in the hospital system.
Rainwater has damaged the road surface outside the school and children keep slipping.
